overview.minides: The 992.2 is the most comprehensively updated 911 in decades, with a T-Hybrid system on the GTS, wider digital cockpit, and sharper chassis.
overview.description: The Porsche 911 (992.2) launched as a mid-cycle facelift of the 992-generation in 2025. The headline addition is the GTS T-Hybrid powertrain — the first electrification of a 911 — pairing a 3.6L biturbo flat-six with an electric turbo-compressor and a belt-alternator starter for a combined 541 hp. All variants get a new 12.6-inch curved cluster, revised 10.9-inch PCM touchscreen, higher-resolution rear camera, and Porsche's latest InnoDrive adaptive cruise with predictive routing. The lineup spans 8 variants: Carrera, Carrera S, Carrera GTS (T-Hybrid, Coupe), Carrera 4, Carrera 4S, Carrera 4 GTS (T-Hybrid, Coupe), Targa 4 and Targa 4S — all mated to the 8-speed PDK.

suspension.front: Independent MacPherson strut with LSA (Lightweight Stable Axle)
suspension.additionalTech: PASM (Porsche Active Suspension Management) standard on S/GTS; optional on Carrera

brakes.front: 6-piston aluminium monobloc caliper, 350 mm vented disc (Carrera/Carrera 4) / 380 mm (S/GTS/Targa 4S)
brakes.rear: 4-piston aluminium monobloc caliper, 330 mm vented disc (Carrera) / 360 mm (S/GTS/Targa 4S)
brakes.pccbOptional: Porsche Ceramic Composite Brakes (PCCB) available as option
